question.label: Feedback texture
question.name: How has the feedback on your recent work landed for you?
question.description: Explores whether feedback is useful, discouraging, or unclear in practice.

answer: I probably don't ask for enough feedback. I don't want to seem like I don't know what I'm doing.

assessment.note: He said he avoids asking for feedback because he doesn't want to seem incompetent, which signals some clarity-seeking but no clear growth uplift from the answer itself.

new_queue.label: Stretch gap
new_queue.name: Where do you feel like you're not getting enough stretch right now?

history.answer_excerpt: Honestly kind of drained. I haven't been sleeping well and I'm behind on things.
A bit disconnected. I don't really know the team outside of tickets, and I missed the last two socials.
Honestly kind of drained. I haven't been sleeping well and I'm behind on things.
I've been putting off the follow-up on that PR. Every time I open it I feel a bit sick.
Not really. I'm usually scrolling at 11pm trying to not think about work.
The design-system PR — I got a ton of rework feedback and I'm not sure if I did something wrong or if that's just how reviews go here.
I probably don't ask for enough feedback. I don't want to seem like I don't know what I'm doing.
Not really. I'm usually scrolling at 11pm trying to not think about work.
